home.hero_title: The concierge that cares for your pet
home.hero_subtitle: A bespoke service, throughout France. Dogs, cats and exotic pets entrusted to certified professionals.
home.services_subtitle: Sitting, training, grooming, transport — everything your companion needs, insured and supervised.
home.process_step1_desc: Fill in our form in just a few minutes — pet type, desired service, dates, address.
home.process_step2_desc: Our team identifies the certified professional best suited to your pet and situation.
home.process_step3_title: Your pet is in good hands
home.process_step3_desc: Real-time updates, photo reports, AXA insurance included. You leave with complete peace of mind.
home.newsletter_subtitle: Pet wellness tips, exclusive offers and Petcheri news delivered straight to your inbox.

dog.hero_subtitle: Sitting, training, walking, grooming — our certified petsitters treat your companion like their own.

cat.hero_subtitle: Home visits, sitting and personalised care — respectful of your cat's territory and habits.

nac.hero_title: Specialist care for your exotic pets
nac.hero_subtitle: Rabbits, birds, reptiles, rodents — our providers trained in exotic species take care of everything.

footer.tagline: The concierge that cares for your pet.
